nasb.text: Beloved, I pray that in all respects you may prosper and be in good health, just as your soul prospers.

esv.text: Beloved, I pray that all may go well with you and that you may be in good health, as it goes well with your soul.

cnv.text: 親愛的，我祝你凡事亨通，身體健壯，正如你的靈魂安泰一樣。

ccb.text: 亲爱的弟兄，衷心地祝你凡事顺利，身体和灵魂一样健康。

csbs.text: 蒙爱的人哪，我愿你凡事安顺，身体健康，正如你的灵魂安顺。
